item.name: Grain Bundle
item.description: A field resource. Sell it at any town market for gold.

item.name: Grain Bundle
item.description: A field resource. Sell it at any town market for gold.

residents.title: Guide
dialogue: The roads connect at the edges out there. Keep your bearings.
If you clear a whole floor, claim the boon before moving on.
residents.name: Devin

residents.title: Scout
dialogue: If something important comes into view, stop and reassess.
Open ground favors range. Tight ground favors nerve.
residents.name: Devin

residents.title: Watcher
dialogue: Keep moving if the streets feel too quiet.
A good town sees the road before the road sees it.
residents.name: Nett

residents.title: Passing Traveler
dialogue: I has been on the road a while. There's something worth investigating — the area.
The road's been full of surprises. Keep your eyes open.
I don't stay in one place long, but this seemed worth a stop.
residents.name: Joss

residents.title: Chicken
dialogue: The chicken scratches at the ground.

residents.title: Chicken
dialogue: The chicken eyes you cautiously.

residents.title: Chicken
dialogue: The chicken pecks at something near the path.

residents.title: Dog
dialogue: The dog sniffs at the air nearby.

residents.title: Dog
dialogue: The dog circles once, then sits.

residents.title: Cat
dialogue: The cat settles on a warm patch of path.

message: A new journey begins in Crossing Ford. WASD or arrows to move. Space attacks, F fires. Seed 554.
